outcome_record.event_name: Serie A Round 26 — Inter Milan vs Juventus (GK change at T-1h)

prediction.pre_match_note: BREAKING NEWS RELOAD triggered at T-1h. Juventus starting GK confirmed out in warm-up (injury). Backup GK starts — quality delta applied ×0.85. Direction AWAY (Inter) maintained but confidence reduced. Previous signal: SMS 74, HOME. New signal: SMS 61, AWAY with lower confidence. Breaking news protocol: MODIFY applied.

calibration_flags.notes: Breaking news MODIFY protocol validated. GK change at T-1h → RELOAD signal, apply backup modifier ×0.85, reduce SMS 74→61. Direction changed from HOME to AWAY — and AWAY was correct. This validates the core breaking-news-intelligence.md protocol: Category 1 (key player absent) + Protocol RELOAD/MODIFY produces better signals than ignoring breaking news.
